Commercial Removals Birmingham

Whether you are relocating a warehouse, moving retail premises, or transferring commercial equipment between sites, The Royals Removals delivers reliable and efficient commercial removal services across Birmingham and the West Midlands.

  • ✓ Fully insured & vetted professional team
  • ✓ Free no-obligation quotes in minutes
  • ✓ Same-day response & flexible move dates
  • ✓ Careful handling & damage protection guarantee
Get Your Quote 📞 07345 624506 📱 WhatsApp Us

Quote Request Received!

📞 Can't wait? Call us direct: 07345 624506

Commercial moves present unique challenges that require specialist knowledge and equipment. From heavy machinery and warehouse racking to retail fixtures and catering equipment, our team is experienced in handling the full range of commercial relocation needs.

We understand that business continuity is your top priority during a move. That is why we work closely with you to plan every detail in advance, schedule the move at the most convenient time, and execute the relocation efficiently to get you back up and running as quickly as possible.

Our commercial removals service is available to businesses of all sizes and across all industries. We have successfully relocated retail shops, restaurants, warehouses, workshops, salons, clinics, and more throughout Birmingham and the surrounding region.

What's Included

  • ✓ Full commercial and business relocations
  • ✓ Warehouse and storage facility moves
  • ✓ Retail shop and showroom relocations
  • ✓ Commercial equipment and machinery transport
  • ✓ Heavy item handling with specialist equipment
  • ✓ Secure packing and labelling of all items
  • ✓ Flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends
  • ✓ Logistics planning and move coordination

Why Choose The Royals Removals?

Commercial moves differ significantly from residential ones. The items are often heavier, more awkward, and more costly to replace. The timelines are tighter, and the consequences of delays can directly impact your revenue.

The Royals Removals brings the right combination of manpower, equipment, and planning to every commercial project. Our vehicles are equipped with tail lifts and heavy-duty strapping systems to handle large items safely. Our crew is trained in manual handling and experienced with commercial environments including loading bays, freight lifts, and multi-storey premises.

We also understand the importance of communication during a commercial move. You will have a single point of contact throughout the process, keeping you informed at every stage and ensuring nothing is overlooked.

Fully Insured & Professionally Protected

Every move we carry out is covered by comprehensive goods-in-transit insurance (up to £50,000) and public liability insurance (up to £5 million). You are in safe hands with our insured moving company in Birmingham.

🛡️
Public Liability

Up to £5 million cover

🚛
Goods in Transit

Up to £50,000 per move

✅
Every Move Covered

No exceptions, no exclusions

Who Is This Service For?

  • Warehouse and distribution businesses
  • Retail shops and showrooms
  • Restaurants and catering companies
  • Manufacturing and industrial businesses
  • Any business relocating premises in Birmingham

Areas We Cover

We provide this service across Birmingham and the wider West Midlands.

Birmingham Dudley Sandwell Walsall Wolverhampton + View All Areas

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you handle heavy commercial equipment? +
Yes. Our team is trained in manual handling and we have specialist equipment including heavy-duty trolleys, straps, and vehicles with tail lifts for safely moving large or heavy commercial items.
Do you offer out-of-hours commercial moves? +
Absolutely. We understand that many businesses prefer to move outside of trading hours. We offer evening, overnight, and weekend commercial removals to suit your schedule.
How do you quote for a commercial move? +
We arrange a free site survey to assess the volume, weight, and access requirements for your move. Based on this, we provide a detailed written quotation with no hidden costs.
Can you move commercial refrigeration units? +
Yes. We have experience moving commercial refrigeration, catering equipment, and other specialist items. We ensure they are transported upright and securely to avoid damage.

Ready to Get Started?

Get your free, no-obligation quote for Commercial Removals Birmingham in just 2 minutes. Our team responds within 10–15 minutes.
